questions.question: LeetCode #1 Two Sum: Given an integer array and a target, return indices of two numbers that sum to target. What high-level approach should you use?
LeetCode #3 Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters: Find the length of the longest substring without duplicates. What approach is best?
questions.answer: sliding window with hash set or map

questions.question: LeetCode #15 3Sum: Return all unique triplets that sum to zero. What high-level algorithm should you use?
questions.answer: sort then two pointers with duplicate skipping

questions.question: LeetCode #42 Trapping Rain Water: Compute trapped water between bars. What strategy is typically optimal?
questions.answer: two pointers tracking left and right max

questions.question: LeetCode #56 Merge Intervals: Merge overlapping intervals. What high-level approach should you apply?
questions.answer: sort by start and greedily merge

questions.question: LeetCode #102 Binary Tree Level Order Traversal: Return values level by level. Which strategy is standard?
LeetCode #200 Number of Islands: Count connected components of land in a grid. Which approach should you use?
questions.answer: graph traversal using dfs or bfs flood fill

questions.question: LeetCode #215 Kth Largest Element in an Array: Find the kth largest value. What high-level approach is preferred?
questions.answer: min heap of size k or quickselect
